Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...Well, I'd like to put out some tea, but I have to take these off first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}They're hand wraps, mainly for protecting my hands and wrists.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}They're more than just fashionable. These hand wraps protect my hands and wrists.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Not only do these protect me, but they can affect the power of my punches depending on how I wrap them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Whether my fists deal damage or not depends on these. I guess they're like my partners in the ring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Anyways, make yourself comfortable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}So, the reason I asked you to join me today... It's because I wanted you to know what I've been working on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I spent a lot of time training and gaining more experience...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}And I thought I'd finally reached a point where I could feel confident in my abilities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}...But after hearing what the Appriser said, I felt afraid.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I felt anger too, knowing that all the training I'd put myself through was meaningless.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I told myself I'd face things head-on, but I'm still as weak as I was before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}Tell me... Do you think I'm strong enough now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Heh. I'd like to think so, but I did lose my way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Fair enough. Maybe I'll find my answer in the near future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Heh, you're totally right. I'm sure I'll find my answer soon enough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Everyone loses confidence in themselves from time to time, and that's when their weakness rears its ugly head.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Being on the verge of grasping something, but grappling with the fear and frustration of losing everything again... It's so hard to overcome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}And it's a feeling I understand all too well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I know we've pushed this crucial decision on you, and I can only imagine how hard that must be.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}But... try not to blame Junpei and the others.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_015_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They can make it up to me.

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Huh. You really are strong, you know that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}That's fine. I know they'll come through.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I guess I could've saved you some trouble if I spoke up sooner, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Anyway, as someone who was there too, I just wanted you to know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}...No matter what you decide, I'm still gonna do what I have to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I've faced off against countless opponents to get where I am now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}If I said all my training was meaningless, then that would be spitting on all of their efforts, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}And that would be absolutely unacceptable. Wouldn't you agree?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Sorry, I didn't mean to go on a tangent like that.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}Not only did I ask you to join me today, but you got dragged into my fight, too. I've gotta at least pay you back for that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Hmm... I'm pretty sure my special protein blend is around here somewhere...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can see a familiar handmade[n]craft on the desk.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's that cardboard gold medal[n]that Sanada's sister made...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I was thinking of sending that back to my parents when I write them a New Year's card.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 3 25 25}We don't know how the future's gonna turn out. It's better if it doesn't stay with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}You're one unusual guy. I was thinking this during the fight earlier, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}For some reason, I feel like I can trust you to watch my back. Together, we can overcome anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}For a long time, all I cared about was having the power to protect others.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}And I thought being hard on myself and competing with others was the only way I was gonna do that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Although, it is true that I've gotten more capable through my reckless approach.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}But now, there are others who fight alongside me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}So I have people who I want to protect, but at the same time, I want them to be there fighting with me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}...In the end, it's because I have all of you that I feel like I can become even stronger.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}...I still don't know if I'm strong or kind enough to deserve this medal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}But this is my starting point, and it's something that I should keep with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}You've taught me another valuable lesson today. Now, where to put this...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}...It's a huge honor. I'll fight to protect it like a champ guarding his title.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}Heh, if you say so. I'll keep fighting like I'm up for a shot at the title belt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}...I may not be very good at motivating people with words, or communicating how I feel.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}But you can trust I'll never back down from a fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Even if I'm battered and on the ground, I'll get back up every time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}I'll never give up. That's my duty to all of you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}So you can count on me... I swear I will protect you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}...That being said, there's still so much I owe you for.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}I'll be doing what I can to pay back that debt. I haven't really thanked you for all your help until now, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}Ah, right. I was going to at least thank you for what you did today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 3 25 25}Damn... Looks like I'm out of protein powder.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}What else do I have...? Ah, here. You can have these dumbbells.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}Just a minute. I'll get them ready for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}You can change the weight on these ones to match whatever your muscle strength is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}In your case, I'd start with 8kg... No, actually I think you can handle 10.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}You could also use a machine, but you gotta do some resistance training with free weights, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I quietly acknowledged Sanada's[n]determination, then returned to my room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel inspired by his enthusiasm...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_SPUP_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}Max SP increased by 3.[n]{f 1 1}
